scripts.dev: npm run build -w @pingpong/shared && concurrently -k -n shared,server,web "npm run dev -w @pingpong/shared" "npm run dev -w @pingpong/server" "npm run dev -w @pingpong/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @pingpong/shared && npm run build -w @pingpong/web && npm run build -w @pingpong/server
scripts.clean: rimraf apps/server/dist apps/web/dist packages/shared/dist coverage playwright-report apps/web/test-results
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @pingpong/shared && npm run lint -w @pingpong/shared && npm run lint -w @pingpong/server && npm run lint -w @pingpong/web
scripts.lint: npm run typecheck && npm run lint:eslint && npm run format:check
scripts.test: npm run build -w @pingpong/shared && npm run test -w @pingpong/shared && npm run test -w @pingpong/server && npm run test -w @pingpong/web
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build && npm run audit
scripts.mongo:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d mongo
